title: luzula spicata subsp. italica
intro: Luzula spicata subsp. italica, also known as Italian woodrush, is a subspecies of the Luzula spicata plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Luzula spicata subsp. italica include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Luzula spicata subsp. italica can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
